predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person cannot prove Belgian nationality and is therefore a foreigner under the law.

predicates.name: has_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person can prove they hold Belgian nationality. Directly assertable as a background fact in case texts.

predicates.name: is_eu_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_eu_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under EU law on free movement as defined in the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not an EU citizen and not covered by EU free movement law.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets or continues to meet the legal conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or residence (illegal residence).

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The person is subject to a procedure to determine or transfer to the responsible member state for an international protection request.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person regarding risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a current and real risk that the person will abscond, established after individual examination on the basis of objective criteria.

predicates.name: no_residence_application_filed_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
predicates.description: The person did not file a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not submit an international protection request within the legally prescribed period.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a protection, residence, removal, or pushback procedure.

predicates.name: fails_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for enforcement of regulations on entry, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: indicated_unwillingness_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has indicated unwillingness to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is subject to an entry ban in Belgium or another member state that has not been lifted or suspended.

predicates.name: filed_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person filed a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal of entry or residence, end of stay, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously given fingerprints in another state bound by EU rules on determining the state responsible for an international protection request.

predicates.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in Belgium or other member states that resulted in negative decisions or did not lead to a residence permit.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request
predicates.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by EU rules on determining the responsible state.

predicates.name: entered_for_purposes_other_than_stated_application
predicates.description: The person declared or their file shows they came to Belgium for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection request or residence application.

predicates.name: fined_for_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
predicates.description: The person has been fined for submitting a manifestly unfounded appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: holds_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person holds a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_home_country
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: nationality_eligible_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The person qualifies as an identified foreigner under the law: holds a valid travel/identity document, is recognised by their home country, or falls under a ministerial laissez-passer nationality category.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.
